text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm taking the Racer's Oath! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is here. Before it starts, Super
Creek cheerfully approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I, Super Creek, pledge to spoil you a whole ton
this summer!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: After all, this is our first summer together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll prepare your food, clean your ears, sing you
lullabies for your afternoon naps, and everything
in between! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she's got more than all the bases
covered.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I have one more promise to make...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll find a way to overcome my bad health this
summer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
With this magnificent sky and the beautiful
ocean, this change in scenery will surely help lift
my spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A change in environment should have a big
effect, but I don't think it's enough to solve all
our problems.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A clue that might lead to a solution is what
occured before the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I need to work harder to make you happy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her condition declined sharply the moment she
resolved to please me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This camp is the perfect opportunity to test out
that theory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if getting too worked up about being kind is
the cause of her problem, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll need to change how she thinks—and I'll use our
time together at summer camp to make it happen.
